contents:
Require Import
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.abstract_algebra
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.orders
  HoTT.Classes.theory.rings
  HoTT.Classes.orders.rings
  HoTT.Classes.implementations.peano_naturals.
Generalizable Variables N R Rle Rlt f.
Lemma nat_le_plus {x y: N}: x ≤ y <-> exists z, y = x + z.

goals.conclusion: x ≤ y <-> {z : N & y = x + z}
x ≤ y <-> {z : N & y = x + z}

contents: #[export] Instance orderreflecting_left_mult : forall (z : N), PropHolds (z <> 0) -> OrderReflecting (z *.).

goals.conclusion: forall z : N, PropHolds (z <> 0) -> OrderReflecting (mult z)
forall z : N, PropHolds (z <> 0) -> OrderReflecting (mult z)
forall x y : N, z * x ≤ z * y -> x ≤ y

contents: #[export] Instance slow_nat_le_dec: forall x y: N, Decidable (x ≤ y) | 10.

goals.conclusion: forall x y : N, Decidable (x ≤ y)
forall x y : N, Decidable (x ≤ y)

contents:
destruct (nat_le_dec (naturals_to_semiring _ nat x) (naturals_to_semiring _ nat y))
as [E | E].

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y
~ (naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y)
naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y
naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y

goals.conclusion: naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y

hypotheses.type: naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y
~ (naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y)
~ (naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y)
~ (naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y)

goals.conclusion: naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y

hypotheses.type: ~ (naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y)
~ (naturals_to_semiring N nat x ≤ naturals_to_semiring N nat y)

contents:
Context `{IsCRing R} `{Apart R} `{!FullPseudoSemiRingOrder (A:=R) Rle Rlt}
    `{!IsSemiRingPreserving (f : N -> R)}.
Lemma between_to_ring n : -f n ≤ f n.
